CustomField.description: This field is used for accounting to identify whether the rent or Fee slip is spanning across different months
CustomField.formula: IF(AND(MONTH( leaseworks__Rent__r.leaseworks__Start_Date__c )!= MONTH( leaseworks__Rent__r.leaseworks__For_Month_Ending__c ), (ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c, 'Rent')|| ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c, 'HL/SL-Rent'))), true, IF(AND(MONTH(leaseworks__Period_Start_Date__c ) != MONTH(leaseworks__Period_End_Date__c),(ISPICKVAL(leaseworks__Invoice_Type__c, 'Fee'))), true, false))
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Read-only formula field, used for accounting to identify whether the rent slip is spanning across different months.
CustomField.label: _Is Deferred Rent
